# DEFERRED — the parked backlog (one place to check)

**19 deferred items.** _Generated by `derive_deferred` from `source-of-truth/v2_supplement/security.json` (+ framework). This is the single checklist; to resume a group, use the prompt shown under it._

## Auth-last — wire auth → these light up  (7)
_prompt: "wire auth" (or "resume the auth-last security items")_

- [ ] RLS policies per table (gen_db) — need roles/actor wired
- [ ] RBAC enforcement — check_access: every entity action traces to a role
- [ ] IDOR / object-level authorization probe — need real identities
- [ ] auth-bypass probe — protected routes return 401 without a token
- [ ] session/cookie hardening (HttpOnly + Secure + SameSite) + CSRF tokens
- [ ] security event logging into audit_events
- [ ] object-level authorization by role/session (IDOR) across ALL read endpoints — the open pre-auth API; cert render is now capability-gated (verification_code) as defense-in-depth, full ownership checks land with auth

## DPDP enforcement — NOT auth-gated, do anytime  (4)
_prompt: "do the DPDP consent-enforcement"_

- [ ] ENFORCE consent at student create — block unless consent_obtained=true (a gen_rules guard)
- [ ] erasure endpoint — cascade student -> results/certificates (right to be forgotten)
- [ ] consent-withdrawal flow + audit trail
- [ ] retention sweep job — purge data past retention_days

## Hardening backlog  (4)
_prompt: "work the security hardening backlog"_

- [ ] column-level / at-rest encryption verification for PII (production)
- [ ] signed + expiring upload URLs + per-object access control
- [ ] deeper dependency / slopsquat scanning
- [ ] periodic external penetration test

## Framework / annotation ladder  (4)
_prompt: "apply the <step> annotations to source" or a specific item_

- [ ] auto-write the remaining ladder step types (action/entry/new-field) into source once trusted (apply_annotations extension)
- [ ] bidirectional trace graph (requirement ↔ source ↔ generated file ↔ test)
- [ ] golden-output snapshot tests for generators
- [ ] questions⇄gates duality meta-gate
